page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. The instance provides 64 physical cores and 64 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration that ensures dedicated, non-hyperthreaded execution resources.

The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

Given its dedicated physical core allocation and high clock speed, the instance offers predictable compute performance without resource sharing. This hardware profile is suited for workloads requiring consistent CPU execution and moderate memory density, such as web serving, application backends, and general-purpose enterprise workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.16xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz, delivering 64 physical cores and 64 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance features 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. This configuration is designed for workloads requiring dedicated, non-hyperthreaded compute resources, making it suitable for general-purpose enterprise applications, web serving, and moderate-scale database hosting.
